variants.label: Arch — Headless server / container host
variants.description: Vanilla Arch (mainline linux 7.x, DKMS r8125 + broadcom + nvidia-open). Containers (podman, docker, distrobox, incus), libvirt+qemu, cockpit web admin. NVIDIA driver included.

variants.label: Arch — KDE Plasma desktop
variants.description: Vanilla Arch + Plasma 6 desktop, full gaming stack (Steam, gamescope, mangohud, lutris, sunshine, Xbox controller), SteamOS-style switchable gamescope session, NVIDIA proprietary driver.

variants.label: Arch — GNOME desktop
variants.description: Vanilla Arch + GNOME Shell desktop, full gaming stack (Steam, gamescope, mangohud, lutris, sunshine, Xbox controller), NVIDIA proprietary driver. No SteamOS session switcher (KDE-only today).

variants.label: CachyOS — Headless server / container host
variants.description: Default CachyOS 7.x kernel (clang+ThinLTO, AutoFDO-profiled, EEVDF scheduler) with pre-built zfs + r8125 + nvidia-open modules. Containers (podman, docker, distrobox, incus), libvirt+qemu, cockpit web admin. NVIDIA driver included.

variants.label: CachyOS — KDE Plasma desktop
variants.description: Default CachyOS kernel (clang+ThinLTO, AutoFDO, EEVDF) + Plasma 6 desktop, full gaming stack (Steam, gamescope, mangohud, lutris, sunshine, Xbox controller), SteamOS-style switchable gamescope session, NVIDIA proprietary driver. CachyOS performance tunings.

variants.label: CachyOS — GNOME desktop
variants.description: Default CachyOS kernel (clang+ThinLTO, AutoFDO, EEVDF) + GNOME Shell desktop, full gaming stack (Steam, gamescope, mangohud, lutris, sunshine, Xbox controller), NVIDIA proprietary driver. No SteamOS session switcher (KDE-only today).
